title: College Green (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
When you meet an ancient man,
        Be as silent as you can;
        So when old age comes to you,
        Courtesies shall gather too.

        And King Billy's horse will start
        From our street and from our heart,
        When each Irishman shall be
        Perfected in courtesy.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James Stephens delivers a powerful performance in "College Green (The Rocky Road To Dublin)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
